name: Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Limited
summary: Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Limited manufactures and sells fertilizers and industrial products in India. The company offers industrial products, such as anhydrous ammonia, argon gas, caprolactam, melamine, methanol, methyl ethyl ketoxime, nylon-6 chips, oleum, sulphuric acid, acetone cyanohydrine, anone-anol mixture, cyclohexane, cyclohexanone, hydroxylamine sulphate, methacrylic acid, methyl methacrylate, nitric acid, nylon-6 filament yarns, polymethyl methacrylate, GUJCON CRF and PRF polyamide-6 fibres, and technical grade urea. It also provides fertilizer products, including urea, ammonium sulphate, di-ammonium phosphate, ammonium phosphate sulphate, NPK, water soluble fertilizers, micro mixes, and gypsum, as well as agro products. In addition, the company is involved in the trading of chemicals, and fertilizers and agro products; and provision of agro services. Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Limited was founded in 1962 and is based in Vadodara, India.
